title: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer Quits | The Pulse 6/22/2026
title_cn: 英国首相凯尔·斯塔默辞职 |脉搏 2026 年 6 月 22 日
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Gilles Moëc, Axa Chief Economist; John Aylward, Sona Asset Management Founder & CIO; Anand Menon, UK In A Changing Europe Director; Greg Fleming, Rockefeller Capital Management President & CEO (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasuries Decline as Trump’s Iran Threats Stoke Inflation Fears

summary: Treasuries fell after President Donald Trump again threatened military action against Iran over Hezbollah’s attacks on Israel, prompting investors to reassess inflation risks.

title: JPMorgan’s Lipikhina Sees Europe Stocks Lagging Despite Oil Drop
title_cn: 摩根大通的利皮希纳认为，尽管油价下跌，欧洲股市仍落后
summary: European equities may struggle to keep pace with US and emerging market peers in the second half of the year as falling oil prices threaten a key source of earnings growth, according to Nataliia Lipikhina at JPMorgan Chase & Co.

title_cn: 美伊和谈显示进展迹象后油价下跌

title_cn: 谈判代表表示美伊谈判取得进展，金价上涨
summary: Gold rose after negotiators heralded progress in talks between the US and Iran to find a permanent resolution to the war that’s roiled global markets.

title_cn: 法国和德国就首次公开募股前持有 Tankmaker KNDS 股份达成一致
summary: The German and French governments are set to hold equal stakes in KNDS NV, one of Europe’s most important defense companies, as it gears up for an initial public offering in the near future.

title: China Lays Out Blueprint to Boost Consumption of Clean Energy
title_cn: 中国制定促进清洁能源消费的蓝图
summary: China has laid out broad new rules that mandate increased use of renewables as it continues to shift the focus of its energy transition from building new generation to ensuring it gets consumed.

title: Lithium Plunges in China on Speculation Over Status of CATL Mine
title_cn: 因宁德时代矿山状况猜测，中国锂价暴跌
summary: Chinese lithium futures have shed about 9% in two days on unconfirmed speculation one of the world’s biggest mines for the battery metal may restart soon.

title: Korea Markets Chief Regrets Allowing Single-Stock Leveraged ETFs
title_cn: 韩国市场负责人对允许单一股票杠杆 ETF 感到遗憾
summary: South Korea’s top financial regulator said he regrets not blocking the launch of leveraged exchange-traded funds tracking single stocks last month, warning their negative side effects have grown significantly.

title: Pound Falls to Trade Near 2026 Low as UK’s Starmer Resigns
title_cn: 英国首相斯塔默辞职，英镑跌至 2026 年低点附近

title: Godiva Japan Said to Seek Extension on $464 Million LBO Loan
title_cn: Godiva Japan 据称将寻求延期 4.64 亿美元杠杆收购贷款
summary: Godiva Japan Inc. is in talks with its banking syndicate to extend the repayment deadline on leveraged buyout financing as the chocolate maker struggles in the major Asian market, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Collapsed Lender MFS Said to Have Never Registered £300 Million of Mortgages
title_cn: 倒闭的贷款机构 MFS 据称从未登记过 3 亿英镑抵押贷款
summary: A £300 million ($396 million) portfolio of mortgages linked to collapsed lender Market Financial Solutions Ltd. looks to never have been registered with public property records, according to court filings, threatening to complicate lenders’ efforts to establish their claims over the underlying assets.

title: Qatar Brings Empty LNG Ships Through Hormuz as Exports Rise
title_cn: 随着出口增加，卡塔尔通过霍尔木兹岛运送空液化天然气船
summary: Qatar is rushing to bring home more empty liquefied natural gas tankers as the nation prepares to restart shipments accounting for about a fifth of global supply.

title: Soaring Profits in Emerging Markets Build Case for a Raging Bull Market
title_cn: 新兴市场利润飙升为汹涌的牛市奠定了基础
summary: For the first time in four years, companies in emerging markets are beating profit estimates, giving investors a fresh reason to believe the bull market is just getting started.

title: Iranian Crude Exports Surge Via Hormuz as Activity Picks Up
title_cn: 随着经济活动的增加，伊朗通过霍尔木兹的原油出口激增
summary: Iran has ramped up the amount of oil it sends openly through the Strait of Hormuz to the highest since the war began, as shipping activity picks up while Tehran and Washington seek a lasting peace deal.

title: Australian Spot Power Price Jumps on Still and Cloudy Weather
title_cn: 澳大利亚现货电价因无风和多云天气而上涨
summary: A key spot price in Australia’s electricity market jumped as calm conditions curbed wind turbine output, highlighting weather’s growing role as a driver of power market volatility.

title: EasyJet Rejects Castlelake Takeover Bids
title_cn: 易捷航空拒绝卡斯尔莱克收购要约
summary: EasyJet has rejected three separate offers from Castlelake, prompting the investment firm to take its latest proposal that values the budget carrier at about £4.74 billion ($6.3 billion) directly to shareholders. The UK airline said it rejected the proposal as not being in the best interest of shareholders, accusing Castlelake of trying to buy the company "on the cheap." Bloomberg's Benedikt Kammel reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Escrivá Says ECB Must Be Vigilant on Oil Price Impact on Wages
title_cn: 埃斯克里瓦表示欧洲央行必须警惕油价对工资的影响
summary: The European Central Bank must watch for any knock-on impact on wages from higher oil and commodity prices resulting from the Middle East conflict, Governing Council member Jose Luis Escrivá said.

title: Japan’s Push for Corporate Growth Sets Off Skepticism
title_cn: 日本推动企业增长引发质疑
summary: The Japanese government’s new push to encourage companies to use their cash for longer-term growth is raising concerns it will lead to unprofitable investments and erode corporate value.

title_cn: 世界银行表示，到 2035 年，人工智能将使波兰经济增长 12%
summary: Artificial Intelligence could boost Poland’s economy by as much as 12% by 2035 and help it converge with the world’s richest countries even as local cost advantages fade, the World Bank said.

title: China Makes Sweeping Education Reforms to Prepare for AI Era
title_cn: 中国进行全面教育改革，为人工智能时代做好准备
summary: Beijing has eliminated over 12,000 university degree programs, dismissing many as relics of a bygone era

title_cn: 微软和雪佛龙签署德克萨斯数据中心 20 年电力协议
summary: Chevron Corp. signed a 20-year deal with Microsoft Corp. to provide natural-gas fired power for a proposed West Texas data center, which could be one of the biggest in the US.

title: Getty Images Soars 200% in Early Trading After OpenAI Deal
title_cn: OpenAI 交易后早期交易飙升 200%
summary: Shares of Getty Images Holdings Inc. jumped about 200% in premarket trading on Monday after the photography repository announced a licensing deal with OpenAI.

title: SpaceX Shares Poised to Fall Again as US Market Reopens
title_cn: 随着美国市场重新开放，SpaceX 股价将再次下跌
summary: SpaceX shares fell as much as 4.6% in premarket trading on Monday, putting the stock on pace for a third straight loss as markets reopened following a public holiday.

title: Chinese Backing Helps African Startup Spiro Near Unicorn Status
title_cn: 中国的支持帮助非洲初创公司 Spiro 接近独角兽地位
summary: Chinese investor NewTrails Capital will invest $55 million into African electric mobility startup Spiro, helping boost the company’s valuation.

title: Tencent Tests AI Assistant for Its Super App WeChat in China
title_cn: 腾讯在中国测试其超级应用微信的人工智能助手
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. has started testing a new AI assistant for WeChat as part of its efforts to catch up with peers in China’s white-hot artificial intelligence race.

title: South Korea’s Policy Chief Flags Property Risks From Chip Windfall
title_cn: 韩国政策负责人指出芯片意外之财带来的财产风险
summary: South Korea’s presidential policy chief said policymakers need to consider how gains from the country’s chip-led boom will spread through the broader economy, warning that excess liquidity has historically found its way into the property market.

title: アップル変革のカギはデザイン復権、大ヒット左右する次期CEOの最優先課題－Power On

summary: かつて世界を魅了したアップルのデザイン。次期CEOに託されたのは岐路に立つデザイン部門の再建だ。

title: Hong Kong Seeks IPO Access for Chinese Investors, Higher Quotas
title_cn: 香港寻求中国投资者IPO准入及更高配额
summary: Hong Kong is in talks with Chinese authorities to expand cross-border investment channels and grant mainland buyers access to local initial public offerings, following a regulatory crackdown on illicit offshore capital flows, according to Financial Secretary Paul Chan.

title: Taiwanese Brothers Amass $1 Billion From Boom in Display Chips
title_cn: 台湾兄弟凭借显示芯片的繁荣积累了 10 亿美元
summary: Biing-seng Wu has spent most of his career developing tiny chips that tell pixels on flat-screen displays how and when to light up.

title: UK to Ban Social Media for Under-16s Starting Next Year
title_cn: 英国将从明年开始禁止 16 岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
summary: Big tech companies design their products to maximize user attention, often without regard to whether the content is beneficial, especially for children. Beeban Kidron, author of 'Users,' joins Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss with hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini the need for government intervention to regulate product design, parental responsibility in managing usage, and consumer awareness to make informed choices in the attention economy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s New CEO Must Rebuild a Design Team That Lost Its Way
title_cn: 苹果新任首席执行官必须重建迷失方向的设计团队
summary: Also: The 2027 iPhone and AirPods plans.

title: Amazon Advances Prime Day by One Month Amid AI Shift
title_cn: 人工智能转型期间，亚马逊将 Prime Day 提前一个月
summary: Amazon has moved its annual Prime Day sales event up by one month. The event is strategically important for Amazon as it aims to capture consumer spending, especially in a market where discretionary dollars are tightening and AI is increasingly influencing shopping behavior. Senior E-commerce and retail analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence Poonam Goyal explains the importance of Prime Day for Amazon to David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Millions in Brazil Get Fake Government Mobile Alert After Hack
title_cn: 巴西数百万人在黑客攻击后收到虚假的政府移动警报
summary: Brazil’s Integration and Regional Development Ministry and federal police are investigating an intrusion into the civil defense alert system that sent messages containing the word “misanthropy” to the mobile phones of millions of Brazilians.

title: Romanian Premier Nominee Faces Vote With Majority Unclear
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总理候选人面临投票，多数票数尚不清楚
summary: Romania’s prime minister-designate is facing a difficult confidence vote on Monday, with no clear majority in a deeply divided assembly that might leave him dependent on unprecedented support from far-right lawmakers.

title: Starmer Quits and Sets Out Plan for New UK PM by September
title_cn: 斯塔默辞职并制定九月前新任英国首相的计划
summary: Keir Starmer said he would step down as Britain’s prime minister after suffering a precipitous fall from favor, paving the way for Andy Burnham to succeed him.

title: Markets Expected Starmer's Resignation as UK PM: Amundi
title_cn: 市场预计斯塔默将辞去英国首相职务：Amundi
summary: Amundi Investment Institute Head Monica Defend discusses the market reaction to Keir Starmer's announcement that he will step down as British prime minister. Speaking on Bloomberg Television, she says "this was largely expected," which justifies the "containment in volatility." Defend adds there is still value on the yield and that "the real story is one of fiscal discipline." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Colombian Voters Add to Trump’s Sway in the Americas
title_cn: 哥伦比亚选民增强了特朗普在美洲的影响力
summary: Colombia looks set to join the wave of Latin American nations allied with the Trump administration.

title: Starmer Resigns as UK Prime Minister
title_cn: 斯塔默辞去英国首相职务
summary: Keir Starmer said he would step down as Britain’s prime minister. Speaking outside Number 10, he said he would step down first as Labour leader, with nominations for a contest for a new leader of the party opening on July 9 and completed by Sept. 1. Bloomberg's Ruth David reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Keir Starmer's Leadership Hit Crisis Point
title_cn: 凯尔·斯塔默的领导力如何遭遇危机
summary: Keir Starmer has stepped down as the UK's prime minister after months of pressure. Bloomberg News Editor-in-Chief John Micklethwait discusses what key issues undermined the outgoing premier's time at Number 10. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK's Starmer Announces Resignation as Prime Minister
title_cn: 英国首相斯塔默宣布辞去首相职务
summary: Keir Starmer said he would step down as British prime minister in an emotional speech outside Downing Street. The announcement comes two years after he led the Labour Party back to power with a landslide majority. His departure from Number 10 paves the way for Andy Burnham to attempt to take over as successor. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Cites ‘Major Progress’ After All-Night Talks With US
title_cn: 伊朗称与美国通宵会谈后取得了“重大进展”
summary: Iran said there had been “major progress” in all-night discussions with the US, as the warring sides try to reach a peace deal within two months.

title: Starmer Resigns as UK Prime Minister, Paving Way for Burnham
title_cn: 斯塔默辞去英国首相职务，为伯纳姆铺平道路
summary: Keir Starmer

title: BloombergNEF Electric Vehicle Outlook 2026
title_cn: 彭博新能源财经 2026 年电动汽车展望
summary:
BloombergNEF has released its flagship report examining how electrification and broader industry shifts are reshaping road transport and associated industries over the coming decades. 
Andrew Grant, BloombergNEF's Intelligent Mobility Analyst, and one of the authors of the report, speaks to Lizzy Burden on the evolving electric vehicle market landscape. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa Deploys Police As Anti-Migrant Deadline Looms
title_cn: 南非部署警察应对反移民最后期限
summary: South Africa will deploy more police this week to deter possible violence before a June 30 deadline set by xenophobic protest groups for foreigners to leave the country.

title: Ethiopian PM Abiy Ahmed's Party Wins Elections
title_cn: 埃塞俄比亚总理阿比·艾哈迈德领导的政党赢得选举
summary: Ethiopian Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed has secured another term in office after his Prosperity Party won a landslide victory in parliamentary elections.  Bloomberg's Chief Africa Correspondent Jennifer Zabasajja explains the result gives the Ethiopian leader a fresh mandate to pursue economic reforms, but he faces a daunting list of challenges. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer Expected to Set Resignation Timetable | Daybreak Europe 6/22/2026
title_cn: 英国首相凯尔·斯塔默预计将制定辞职时间表黎明欧洲 6/22/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

Allies of Keir Starmer expect him to set out a timetable for his departure as UK prime minister imminently, putting Britain on course for its seventh premier in a decade and paving the way for Andy Burnham to replace him.

The US and Iran made “encouraging progress” in talks on a peace deal and will continue technical-level discussions this week, mediators said, even as President Donald Trump again threatened strikes if Hezbollah keeps attacking Israel.

Today's guest: Shriya Samarth, EMEA Head of Rates, StoneX (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer on the Brink With Resignation Plan Seen Imminent
title_cn: 斯塔默濒临辞职计划迫在眉睫
summary: Allies of Keir Starmer expect him to set out a timetable for his departure as UK prime minister imminently, putting Britain on course for its seventh premier in a decade and paving the way for Andy Burnham to replace him.

title: Lebanon Remains a Key Area for Success of US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 黎巴嫩仍然是美伊谈判取得成功的关键地区
summary: Talks between the US and Iran will continue this week, according to mediators, even as President Donald Trump threatened strikes if Hezbollah keeps attacking Israel. A resolution to the fighting in Lebanon will be decisive for the success of the talks in Switzerland, according to an official familiar with the discussions. Israel's support is seen as crucial to moving the interim deal forward. Bloomberg's Dan Williams reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer Could Set Out Resignation Timetable Imminently
title_cn: 斯塔默可能会立即制定辞职时间表
summary: Allies of Keir Starmer expect him to set out a timetable for his departure as UK prime minister imminently. A statement from Starmer ceding power could come as soon as Monday, people familiar with the matter said, although they cautioned that was not certain. The move could pave the way for Andy Burnham to replace him and it would put Britain on a course for its seventh premier in a decade. Bloomberg's Joe Mayes reports from Downing Street. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Philippines Slashes 2026 Growth Outlook on Iran War, Graft Mess
title_cn: 菲律宾因伊朗战争和贪污腐败大幅削减 2026 年经济增长预期
summary: The Philippines cut its economic growth target for this year, as the country wrestled with the impact of costlier oil spurred by the Iran war and a government corruption crackdown.

title: The Camp That Reveals South Africa’s Growing Migrant Crisis
title_cn: 难民营揭示了南非日益严重的移民危机
summary: When a vehicle carrying donated diapers pulls into a muddy open field outside a mosque in Durban, Cassim Ibrahim quickly steps forward and asks the driver not to unload them.

title: Australia, Canada Sign $1.8 Billion Deal for Over-Horizon Radar
title_cn: 澳大利亚与加拿大签署价值 18 亿美元的超地平线雷达协议
summary: Australia announced a A$2.5 billion ($1.8 billion) agreement to sell its Over the Horizon Radar system to Canada, as Ottawa aims to strengthen its military presence in the increasingly contested Arctic.

title: US and Iran Make ‘Progress’ in Talks, Aim to Keep Hormuz Open
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在谈判中取得“进展”，旨在保持霍尔木兹海峡开放
summary: The US and Iran made “encouraging progress” in talks on a peace deal and will continue technical-level discussions this week, mediators said, even as President Donald Trump again threatened strikes if Hezbollah keeps attacking Israel.

title: Trump Ally Wins Colombia Election, Heralding Pro-Market Turn
title_cn: 特朗普盟友赢得哥伦比亚大选，预示着亲市场的转变
summary: Colombia elected conservative lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella president on Sunday, heralding a swing back to business-friendly and pro-US policies after four years of leftist rule.

title: Pakistan Seeks Diplomatic Boost With Key Role in US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 巴基斯坦寻求外交推动并在美伊谈判中发挥关键作用
summary: US Vice President JD Vance heaped praise on Pakistan’s prime minister and army chief on Sunday as peace talks with Iran finally kicked off.

title: Trump Ally Wins Initial Count in Colombian Presidential Vote
title_cn: 特朗普盟友在哥伦比亚总统选举中赢得初步计票
summary: Conservative lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella narrowly won the preliminary vote count in Colombia’s presidential election, likely sweeping aside Gustavo Petro’s leftist movement and realigning Bogota with the US.

title: Oil, Drugs and US Relations Hang in the Balance as Colombians Vote for President
title_cn: 哥伦比亚投票选举总统，石油、毒品和美国关系悬而未决
summary: Colombians have voted in one of the most polarized elections in the nation’s history, with the economic model, the war on drugs and relations with the US all hanging in the balance.

title: Romania Premier Nominee Unveils Cabinet, Eyes Fast Approval Vote
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总理候选人公布内阁，期待快速批准投票
summary: Romanian Prime Minister-Designate Adrian Vestea pushed ahead with his bid to win parliamentary approval for a cabinet after receiving the support of the country’s largest party, but it remains unclear whether he could secure a clear majority in the fractious legislature.

title: Poland’s Tusk Warns of ‘Strategic Mistake’ in Spat with Ukraine
title_cn: 波兰图斯克警告与乌克兰的争端存在“战略错误”
summary: Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk warned that Poland and Ukraine were committing a “strategic mistake” as a political conflict over the commemoration of controversial World War II fighters continued to escalate.

title: Romania Premier Nominee Gains Key Ally Ahead of Confidence Vote
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总理候选人在信任投票前获得关键盟友
summary: Romania’s largest party endorsed designated Prime Minister Adrian Vestea, clearing a hurdle for him to take office while potentially leaving him dependent on fringe and far-right lawmakers to govern.

title: Iranian Negotiators Said to Still Be Engaged in Talks With US
title_cn: 据称伊朗谈判代表仍在与美国进行谈判
summary: Talks in Switzerland between the US and Iran were still ongoing despite Iranian media reports that negotiators had left the venue, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Germany Weighs Pension System Revamp with Capital-Market Element
title_cn: 德国考虑利用资本市场因素改革养老金体系
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s ruling coalition is preparing to back a proposal for a sweeping overhaul of Germany’s pension system, including politically sensitive measures such as a market-based savings component, tighter rules on early retirement and a gradual increase in the retirement age, people familiar with the matter said on Sunday.
